db:abstract.db:para: The QtSensors - QML example demonstrates the QML sensors types in the QtSensors import.

db:section.db:title: Qt Sensors in QML
db:section.db:para: To write a QML application that will use the QML sensors types in the QtSensors import you need to to the following steps:
Add the Sensor QML types into your qml file.
In this example we use the TiltSensor:
The Tilt-, AmbientLight- and the Proximity QML sensor types have the 'enabled' property in common. To start or stop the sensor set this property to true or false.
Reading the data can be done for each sensor type like following:
db:section.db:programlisting: text: "X Rotation: " + (tilt.reading ? tilt.reading.xRotation.toFixed(2) + "°" : "Unknown") text: "Y Rotation: " + (tilt.reading ? tilt.reading.yRotation.toFixed(2) + "°" : "Unknown")
